Billing/Payment Dispute: Review charges with account; provide receipt.
Cleanliness: Schedule housekeeping to clean the area immediately.
Food Quality: Inspect kitchen and food storage; check hygiene.
Maintenance: Assign technician to fix the issue within 24 hours.
Noise/Disturbance: Warn the noisy party and enforce quiet hours.
Other: Review student request and respond within 48 hours.
Discuss with student to understand the full issue.
For room change requests — check availability and process within 3 days.
For curfew concerns — discuss with hostel management.
Escalate to owner if cannot resolve at warden level.
Roommate Issue: Mediate between roommates; offer room change if needed.
Safety/Security: Investigate immediately; if serious call police.
Staff Behavior: Counsel the staff member; involve owner if repeated.
